items.name: AB Jamaican Beef Patties
items.description: Lloyd's Patties spicy beef patty, is a people's favorite with just the right amount of Alberta Beef, pastry and spice, for your mouth to enjoy life. Patties are sold by the box $43 or individually.

items.name: AB Jamaican chicken Patties
items.description: These Lloyd's Chicken Patties are made from Canadian raised chickens, are seasoned to perfection, and have a very unique mouth-watering taste, these patties are sold for $43 a box or individually. Great for chicken lovers.

items.name: AB Jamaican Vegetable Patties
items.description: Lloyd's Jamaican Vegetable Patties are great tasting, Canadian grown, and a great alternative for those who do not eat meat, or would like a change from meat. Sold in boxes for $43 or individually.

items.name: Lloyd's Authentic Jerk Chicken
items.description: Chicken goes through full jerk and marinating process, and is baked to perfection. Chicken is sold by the pound for $8.50 a pound, or in a combo with Jamaican style rice and a salad. Sold only on Friday & Saturday. Great meal for those who appreciate spice and flavour throughout each bite.
